# FrameCoach Blog
> Filmmaking tips, camera settings guides, and visual storytelling education from FrameCoach

FrameCoach is a free, real-time camera coaching app for indie filmmakers and content creators. This blog provides educational content about filmmaking fundamentals, camera settings, composition, and production workflow.

## About FrameCoach
FrameCoach is the decision layer for your camera. It coaches filmmakers through ISO, aperture, shutter speed, white balance, and composition decisions on set — in plain language, in real-time.

## Key Pages
- Homepage: https://framecoach.io
- Blog: https://theshumba.github.io/framecoach-blog/
- FAQ: https://theshumba.github.io/framecoach-blog/filmmaking-faq/
- About: https://theshumba.github.io/framecoach-blog/about/
- Camera Settings Guide: https://theshumba.github.io/framecoach-blog/camera-settings-guide/
- Learn Filmmaking: https://theshumba.github.io/framecoach-blog/learn-filmmaking/
- Filmmaker Tools: https://theshumba.github.io/framecoach-blog/filmmaker-tools/

## Topics Covered
- Camera settings (ISO, aperture, shutter speed, white balance, frame rate)
- Shot composition and framing (rule of thirds, leading lines, depth)
- Filmmaking for beginners (getting started, equipment, budgeting)
- Cinematic techniques (lighting, color grading, audio)
- Production workflow (shot lists, pre-production, on-set efficiency)
- Filmmaker tools and apps

## Who It's For
Solo filmmakers, indie crews, content creators, and film students.

## Social
- Twitter/X: https://x.com/framecoachapp
